category_sources: Official GitHub README describes idnits as a CLI/library to inspect Internet-Draft documents for IETF policy conformance.
source_facts.description says it looks for problems in Internet-Draft formatting.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name is `ietf-tools/idnits` and README branding is IDNITS.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents installation, CLI usage, library usage, tests, and development.
Official repository links to the IETF author-tools idnits3 page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value `https://github.com/ietf-tools/idnits`; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README topics include IETF, nits, and Internet-Drafts, and documents CLI/library usage.
